title: Language Change - Earbuds/Headsets and smart Charge Chase/Stand are out of date
scenario: Language change DFU updates all components and changes charge case language on Poly Voyager Free 60+
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. On the Home screen, ensure a multi-component device (e.g., Poly Voyager Free 60+ earbuds with charge case, or a headset with charge stand) is connected and all components are on outdated firmware.
3. Navigate to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Language.
4. Change the language to a different supported language (e.g., from English to French).
5. Tap "Update Now" on the prompt that appears.
6. Observe that the software update screen is triggered and displayed.
7. Allow the DFU (Device Firmware Update) process to complete for all components (earbuds/headset and charge case/stand).
8. After the update finishes, verify the firmware version of all components shows the latest version.
9. Check the language displayed on the smart charge case (e.g., Poly Voyager Free 60+ case screen) to confirm it matches the newly selected language.
expected: The software update screen is triggered after tapping "Update Now". All components (earbuds/headset and charge case/stand) are updated to the latest firmware version. The language on the smart charge case changes to the newly selected language.
